title: Create a governed observe/decide/act/learn loop iteration
persona: AI operations lead with settings edit access
steps: Review live observed signals, policy envelope, anomalies, decisions, proposed actions, learning signals, outcome metrics, and rollback plan.
expected: A persisted AssistantAutonomousOperatingLoop is created with observeJson, decideJson, actJson, learnJson, policyJson, outcomeJson, rollbackJson, and leadershipSummary.
Automation mode is REVIEW_ONLY unless release gate, policy readiness, shadow match, and kill-switch conditions are safe.
No source system, automation policy, release gate, playbook, action execution, or kill-switch setting is mutated automatically.

title: Queue autonomous loop review
persona: Operations controller with settings edit access
steps: Create or select a DRAFT autonomous loop iteration.
Add a review note describing the intended human decision.
expected: The loop status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED with actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with actionKind assistant_autonomous_loop_review.
An AssistantAuditEvent states that source systems, automation policies, release gates, playbooks, action execution, and kill-switch controls were not changed automatically.

title: Kill switch and blocked policy keep loop review-only
steps: Ensure the assistant admin control is paused/blocked or release gate is blocked, or enable a policy below its readiness threshold.
Review the policy, action, and rollback sections.
expected: policyJson automationMode is REVIEW_ONLY and blockedReasons include the active safety blocker.
actJson proposed actions use REVIEW_ONLY execution mode.
rollbackJson includes review-only, policy pause/downgrade, action queue, and audit evidence steps.
No automation executes until a human approves a loop review and underlying controls are safe.
